# Load the JSON files
import json, sys, os, re
qpath = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
hpath = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)
len(qdata), type(qdata[0]) if qdata else None

# Let's implement normalization and search
import re
ar_tashkeel_pattern = re.compile(
    "["+
    "\u0610-\u061A"  # Arabic sign
    "\u064B-\u065F"  # tashkeel
    "\u06D6-\u06ED"  # additional
    "]"
)
tatweel = "\u0640"
# punctuation and Quran marks: remove ar-specific punctuation like ۚ ۖ ۗ ۜ etc in unicode range \u06xx? but they might be in earlier ranges.
# We'll remove also common punctuation and weird small marks
punctuation_re = re.compile(r"[\u0660-\u0669\u06DD\u06DE\u06E9\u06EA\u06EB\u06EC\u06ED\ufe70-\ufeFF\W_]+", flags=re.UNICODE)
# But \W will remove Arabic letters too, so we need custom removal: we'll remove punctuation characters by a list
# Let's create a function

def normalize_ar(text):
    # remove tatweel
    t = text.replace(tatweel, "")
    # remove tashkeel diacritics
    t = ar_tashkeel_pattern.sub("", t)
    # replace alef variants with bare alef
    t = t.replace("آ", "ا").replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("ٱ","ا") # remove wasla sign too maybe
    # replace hamza on waw/ya: replace ؤ ئ with ء
    t = t.replace("ؤ","ء").replace("ئ","ء")
    # replace alef maqsurah ى with ي
    t = t.replace("ى","ي")
    # remove Quran-specific marks ◌ۖ etc: keep only Arabic letters and numbers
    # Let's keep Arabic letters (range \u0621-\u063A and \u0641-\u064A) and spaces
    t = re.sub(r"[^\u0621-\u063A\u0641-\u064A0-9\s]", "", t)
    # collapse spaces and lower (no lower in Arabic)
    t = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", t).strip()
    return t

# Test normalization on given input
inp = "قَالَ أَوَلَمۡ تُؤۡمِنۡ قَالَ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِن لِّيَطۡمَعَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۚ وَٰلَىٰ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ يُؤۡخَذُ كُلُّ دَابۡبَةٍۢ مِمَّآ أَخۡزَنَ ٱللَّهُ فِىٓهَاۚ وَءَاتَىٰٓ كُلًّا مِّنۡ عِلۡمِهِۦٓ"
print(normalize_ar(inp))

# search for occurrences of "قال اولم"
query = normalize_ar("قَالَ أَوَلَمۡ تُؤۡمِنۡ")
matches = []
for norm, entry in norm_ayahs:
    if "قال اولم" in norm or "قال اولم تءمن" in norm:
        matches.append((entry['surah_id'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'], norm))
len(matches), matches[:10]

# Let's compute token-level F1 between candidate and user full substring
full = normalize_ar("قَالَ أَوَلَمۡ تُؤۡمِنۡ قَالَ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِن لِّيَطۡمَعَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۚ وَٰلَىٰ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ يُؤۡخَذُ كُلُّ دَابۡبَةٍۢ مِمَّآ أَخۡزَنَ ٱللَّهُ فِىٓهَاۚ وَءَاتَىٰٓ كُلًّا مِّنۡ عِلۡمِهِۦٓ")
cand = normalize_ar(qdata[ (2-1)*999 if False else 0 ]) # dummy
# find the entry for surah 2 ayah 260
candidate_entry = None
for entry in qdata:
    if entry['surah_id'] == 2 and entry['ayah_id'] == 260:
        candidate_entry = entry
        break
candidate_entry

# find candidate entry for surah 2 ayah 260
candidate_entry = None
for entry in qdata:
    if entry['surah_id'] == 2 and entry['ayah_id'] == 260:
        candidate_entry = entry
        break
candidate_entry

def token_f1(a, b):
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    sa = set(ta)
    sb = set(tb)
    common = sa.intersection(sb)
    # But using sets loses multiplicity; better use counters
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    common_count = 0
    for token in (ca.keys() | cb.keys()):
        common_count += min(ca[token], cb[token])
    # But above counts tokens multiplicity in both; relative to which length?
    # For precision/recall compute:
    overlap = sum(min(ca[t], cb.get(t,0)) for t in ca)
    # overlap = sum(min(ca[t], cb[t]) for t in (ca.keys() & cb.keys()))
    precision = overlap / sum(ca.values()) if sum(ca.values())>0 else 0
    recall = overlap / sum(cb.values()) if sum(cb.values())>0 else 0
    if precision+recall == 0:
        f1 = 0.0
    else:
        f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
    return precision, recall, f1, overlap, sum(ca.values()), sum(cb.values())

full_norm = normalize_ar("قَالَ أَوَلَمۡ تُؤۡمِنۡ قَالَ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِن لِّيَطۡمَعَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۚ وَٰلَىٰ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ يُؤۡخَذُ كُلُّ دَابۡبَةٍۢ مِمَّآ أَخۡزَنَ ٱللَّهُ فِىٓهَاۚ وَءَاتَىٰٓ كُلًّا مِّنۡ عِلۡمِهِۦٓ")
cand_norm = normalize_ar(candidate_entry['ayah_text'])
full_norm, cand_norm, token_f1(cand_norm, full_norm)

# find ayahs containing "اخزن الله فيها"
target = normalize_ar("اخزن الله فيها")
matches = []
for norm, entry in norm_ayahs:
    if "اخزن" in norm and "الله" in norm and "فيها" in norm:
        matches.append((entry['surah_id'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'], norm))
len(matches), matches[:10]

# search for "كل دابّة" normalized
target = normalize_ar("كل داببة")
res = []
for norm, entry in norm_ayahs:
    if "كل داببة" in norm or "كل داب" in norm or "كل دابه" in norm:
        res.append((entry['surah_id'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'], norm))
len(res), res[:20]

# Search for "وآتٰى كل" etc
query = normalize_ar("وآتَىٰ كُلًّا مِنْ عِلْمِهِ")
results=[]
for norm, entry in norm_ayahs:
    if "واتي كلا" in norm or ("اتي" in norm and "كل" in norm and "علم" in norm):
        results.append((entry['surah_id'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text'], norm))
len(results)

for r in results:
    print(r[0], r[1], r[2])

# find surah 21 ayah 93
target_entry = None
for entry in qdata:
    if entry['surah_id'] == 21 and entry['ayah_id'] == 93:
        target_entry = entry
        break
target_entry

# search for 'اخزن'
q = 'اخزن'
found=[]
for norm, entry in norm_ayahs:
    if 'اخزن' in norm:
        found.append((entry['surah_id'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text']))
len(found), found[:20]

# compute best token-F1 across all qdata entries for the full substring
full_norm = normalize_ar("قَالَ أَوَلَمۡ تُؤۡمِنۡ قَالَ بَلَىٰ وَلَٰكِن لِّيَطۡمَعَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْۚ وَٰلَىٰ ٱلۡكَٰفِرِينَ يُؤۡخَذُ كُلُّ دَابۡبَةٍۢ مِمَّآ أَخۡزَنَ ٱللَّهُ فِىٓهَاۚ وَءَاتَىٰٓ كُلًّا مِّنۡ عِلۡمِهِۦٓ")
from collections import Counter
def token_f1_str(a,b):
    # a and b are normalized strings
    ta = a.split()
    tb = b.split()
    ca = Counter(ta)
    cb = Counter(tb)
    overlap = sum(min(ca[t], cb.get(t,0)) for t in ca)
    precision = overlap / sum(ca.values()) if sum(ca.values())>0 else 0
    recall = overlap / sum(cb.values()) if sum(cb.values())>0 else 0
    if precision+recall == 0:
        f1 = 0.0
    else:
        f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
    return f1, precision, recall, overlap

best = []
for norm, entry in norm_ayahs:
    f1,p,r,overlap = token_f1_str(norm, full_norm) # candidate vs full
    best.append((f1, p, r, overlap, entry['surah_id'], entry['ayah_id'], entry['ayah_text']))
best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
best_sorted[:10]

content.text: {"correction":"وَإِذْ قَالَ إِبْرَاهِيمُ رَبِّ أَرِنِي كَيْفَ تُحْيِي الْمَوْتَىٰ ۖ قَالَ أَوَلَمْ تُؤْمِنْ ۖ قَالَ بَلَىٰ وَلَـٰكِنْ لِيَطْمَئِنَّ قَلْبِي ۖ قَالَ فَخُذْ أَرْبَعَةً مِنَ الطَّيْرِ فَصُرْهُنَّ إِلَيْكَ ثُمَّ اجْعَلْ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ جَبَلٍ مِنْهُنَّ جُزْءًا ثُمَّ ادْعُهُنَّ يَأْتِينَكَ سَعْيًا ۚ وَاعْلَمْ أَنَّ اللَّهَ عَزِيزٌ حَكِيمٌ"}
